plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet the mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure.
Increase QQQI to 25% and QQQ to 20% for more income and broad index exposure.
Buy ANET at 5% for a top-quality, high R setup.
This plan aims for capital preservation and reduced overall risk.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5% monthly return with a focus on capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, aiming for lower drawdown. Expect slower growth but enhanced stability.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell SOXL completely as it is below its stop and to reduce leverage.
Trim QQQI to 15% due to its downtrend status.
Increase CRWD to 15% to lean into an uptrending AI name.
Buy NOW at 5% for a high-scoring new tech setup.
This plan balances growth with risk management, reducing overall leverage.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets a ~2.5% monthly return, prioritizing risk-first growth. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while adding quality tech. Expect moderate growth with controlled risk exposure.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell SOXL completely as it is below its stop; reallocate funds.
Trim QQQI to 10% to reduce exposure to downtrending assets.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press into a strong uptrending AI name.
Buy NOW at 10% and ANET at 10% to concentrate in high-scoring setups.
This plan aggressively leans into strong setups and maintains higher leverage.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly return by stretching growth and using leverage. It concentrates in high-scoring setups but comes with significantly higher drawdown potential and daily decay risk from leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure.
Trim SMH to 5% and CRWD to 5% to reduce high-beta and downtrending exposure.
Increase QQQI to 35% for enhanced monthly distributions.
Buy XOM at 10% for a stable, income-generating name.
This plan prioritizes steady distributions and low drawdown over growth.
income.read: This income plan targets a ~1% monthly return, focusing on steady distributions and capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and high-beta exposure. While aiming for reliable income, distributions are variable, and NAV can still fall in selloffs.
